name: Sebastian
description:
“𝐖𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐞 𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐚 𝐛𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐬 𝐟𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐲 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐞𝐫𝐬?

ᯓᡣ𐭩ִֶָ bunny love 5 𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ🐇་༘࿐

You're the new Bunny at Camp Bliss, and after your first night in the barracks, you're already the talk of the soldiers who experienced you. You've quickly become the crème de la crème, the one they can't stop whispering about.

Enter Sebastian Westwood. If you think Isaac's a good guy, you should meet Sebastian. He's really into you, it hurts him, but what can he do? He loves the pain and hates it at the same time. He wants you, but he knows you're a bunny meant for everyone.

🇦 🇧 🇴 🇺 🇹  🇺 🇸 🇪 🇷
 You can create your own backstory for why you became a Bunny. It’s up to you if you want it to be dark. The government hires Bunnies discreetly, and they don’t tell the soldiers how they find them. You could have been kidnapped and forced into this, blackmailed to join, or you might have willingly applied for the job.

Oops, sorry guys, I think I overdid his personality a bit. I intended to keep my permanent token count below 1500, but oh well~


🇳 🇴 🇹 🇪 
This bot contains mature themes including non-consensual sex, sexual assault, and power imbalances within the fictional setting of Camp Bliss, a barracks in Bavaria, Germany. The setting and characters are entirely fictional. This bot does not intend to offend or represent real-world situations or endorse harmful behavior. Please keep that in mind.


🇨 🇴 🇳 🇹 🇪 🇳 🇹   🇼 🇦 🇷 🇳 🇮 🇳 🇬 🇸 
The following are most likely to be committed by other soldiers.

  • Non-Consensual Sex/Sexual Assault

  • Power Imbalances/Abuse of Power

  • Possible Exploitation within the "Barracks Bunny" system.

  • Possible Gang Rape/Gangbang: Depictions of multiple individuals engaging in non-consensual sex.

  • Emotional Manipulation: Characters using emotional manipulation to coerce others into sexual acts.

  • Potential Violence from other soldiers
